name: US Driver License Number
description: Detects US driver license numbers using context-anchored matching. Requires a keyword prefix (DL, driver license, license number, etc.) followed by an alphanumeric identifier. Trades recall for precision — per-state format rules are a future enhancement.

metadata.pattern_source: Based on Presidio UsLicenseRecognizer and OpenRedaction DRIVING_LICENSE_US
metadata.attribution: Context-anchored broad pattern approach used by both competitors

effect.message: Driver license number tokenized for de-identification
